zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Weston於1424年出生在英國素瑞奧可哈姆時，他的父親William Weston VII19歲，母親Margaret Richking21歲。他於大約1450年與Mrs Agnes Wakehurst結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年6月14日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國素瑞奧可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Weston was born in 1424, in Ockham, Surrey, England, his father, William Weston VII, was 19 and his mother, Margaret Richking, was 21. He married Mrs Agnes Wakehurst about 1450. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 14 June 1483, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Ockham, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Weston est né en 1424, à Ockham, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William Weston VII, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Richking, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Agnes Wakehurst environ 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1483, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Ockham, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Weston 1424 in Ockham, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Weston VII 19 und seine Mutter Margaret Richking 21. Er hat um 1450 Mrs Agnes Wakehurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Juni 1483 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ockham, Surrey, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Weston(이)가 1424년 영국 수리 옥카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Weston VII(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Richking(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 Mrs Agnes Wakehurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 6월 14일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 옥카에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Weston nasceu em 1424, em Ockham, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Weston VII, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Richking, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Agnes Wakehurst aproximadamente 1450. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1483, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Ockham, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.Slade, Devon, England: слад би шелдон, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Weston родился в 1424 г. в местности оккхам, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени William Weston VII было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Richking, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Agnes Wakehurst около 1450 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 14 июня 1483 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности оккхам, сурри, Англия.

Murió el 14 de junio de 1483, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Ockham, Surrey, Inglaterra.
